title: Sexy Toto

infobox.value: This article related to an Italian comedy film of the 1960s is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Sexy_Toto&action=edit).

first_paragraph: ***Sexy Toto*** (Italian: ***Totòsexy***) is a 1963 Italian [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") and starring [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") and [Erminio Macario](/wiki/Erminio_Macario "Erminio Macario"). It consisted of a mere montage of scenes discarded from *[Toto's First Night](/wiki/Toto%27s_First_Night "Toto's First Night")*. It attracted around 880,000 spectators, considerably less than usual for a Totò film.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1963 Italian film

| Sexy Toto | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") |
| Written by | * [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") * [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi") |
| Produced by | Mario Mariani |
| Starring | * [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") |
| Cinematography | Alessandro D'Eva |
| Edited by | [Jolanda Benvenuti](/wiki/Jolanda_Benvenuti "Jolanda Benvenuti") |
| Music by | [Armando Trovajoli](/wiki/Armando_Trovajoli "Armando Trovajoli") |
| Production companies | * Cinex * Incei Film |

| Release date | * 5 September 1963 (1963-09-05) |
| Running time | 100 minutes |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | Italian |

***Sexy Toto*** (Italian: ***Totòsexy***) is a 1963 Italian [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") and starring [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") and [Erminio Macario](/wiki/Erminio_Macario "Erminio Macario"). It consisted of a mere montage of scenes discarded from *[Toto's First Night](/wiki/Toto%27s_First_Night "Toto's First Night")*. It attracted around 880,000 spectators, considerably less than usual for a Totò film.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sexy_Toto&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

After being arrested for criminal activities, two street musicians swap sexy stories with the other inmates.
